title: Tribal Member receives public service award
summary: Sweet Award Kimberley Sweet, a Magistrate Judge in Kenai and a former Kenaitze Tribal Court Chief Judge, was recently honored for her public service. Sweet, a Tribal Member, received the 2021 Jay Rabinowitz Public Service Award, presented by the Alaska Bar Foundation. The award was presented during the Alaska Bar Association’s virtual annual meeting in S...

title: RFP: Pilgrim Hot Springs Food Distribution Model
summary: Project Description Kawerak, Inc. is soliciting Proposals as a co-managing owner of Unaatuq, LLC for Pilgrim Hot Springs. This Request for Proposals is for conducting a community food assessment in the Bering Strait Region, and developing a food production and distribution model for Pilgrim Hot Springs. The contractor should use data collected by Kawerak, Inc. during the growing & harvesting season, as well as historical data from previous agricultural efforts. The contractor will be able to determine a supply and demand chain that works best for o...
